// purpose: Type-checks the VS Code extension's TypeScript modules. esbuild
// rationale: stays the build pipeline (build-vendor.mjs strips types per-file);
//: tsc here is a lint-only step run via `npm run typecheck`.
// note: The extension is loaded by VS Code's Node host (CommonJS). Source
// note2: files use `const x = require(...)` rather than ES imports — this
// note3: tsconfig keeps that shape (module: commonjs) and uses
// note4: esModuleInterop so `const vscode = require('vscode')` still picks
// strict-overrides: Initial post-migration state — strict: true plus targeted off-
// strict-overrides.2: overrides for the two flags with backlog: noImplicitAny (~166
// strict-overrides.3: sites) and strictNullChecks (~36 sites — mostly around the
// strict-overrides.4: vendored engine.min.js typed any, and FlatPPLPanel state).
// strict-overrides.5: Each is a future ratchet, same pattern as the engine's pass.
